summary: MobiLipid aims to streamline lipidomics workflows by offering a fully automated solution for assessing and correcting collision cross section (CCS) bias in ion mobility-mass spectrometry (IM-MS) analyses.
MobiLipid enhances CCS quality control by providing an R Markdown that integrates into IM-MS lipidomics workflows.
CCS bias calculation and correction can be implemented effectively with a low number of lipids detected per lipid class.
